name: @rhombus-std/config.transformer
description: The @rhombus-std/config authoring transformer: rewrites .withType<T>() on a ConfigBuilder into a generated .withSchema({...}) runtime schema literal at compile time. A Go/ttsc descriptor package — the lowering runs in the shared owner binary.
//rhombus.inline: The .withType<T>() config-schema sugar's inline publish list. The body lives in src/inline.ts (authoring-only substitution source, kept out of any barrel + dist); the inline stage side-parses it and substitutes at consumer call sites, then the schemaof stage lowers the schemaof<T>() it mints into the runtime schema literal. The `type` ANCHOR is @rhombus-std/config's ConfigBuilder interface (the withType<U>() augmentation target, declared in config's with-type-augment.ts); `impl` (ConfigBuilderInline) resolves in THIS package — schemaof is the authoring-time config-schema primitive homed here (src/schemaof.ts), imported package-relative.
